fig1-mlp-schematic.description: Figure 1: Schematic diagram of the Magnetic Levitation Plant (MLP)

fig2-digital-control-circuit.description: Figure 2: Digital control circuit/Simulink model used for magnetic levitation

fig3a-analog-output.description: Figure 3(a): Analog control output — levitated ball at equilibrium

fig3b-digital-output.description: Figure 3(b): Digital control output — levitated ball with digital controller

fig4-square-wave-response.description: Figure 4: Ball position response corresponding to square wave input
